description_long: This lantern features a cylindrical glass enclosure with a weathered, yellowish metal top and base, both showing signs of rust and age. The lantern is topped with a large, octagonal metal handle, also painted yellow and heavily worn, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. The glass appears frosted or dirty, diffusing any light source within and giving the lantern a rugged, utilitarian look. The metal components are thick and robust, likely designed for durability in outdoor urban environments. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible decorative elements, focusing on practicality. The lantern's size and handle indicate it is portable and intended for manual carrying or hanging.
description: A rugged, cylindrical lantern with a frosted glass body and weathered yellow metal top, base, and octagonal handle. The design is utilitarian and portable, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full octagonal handle, cylindrical frosted glass body, and weathered yellow metal top and base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handle and the cylindrical shape of the lantern, with the handle aligned vertically.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the handle and cylindrical body, but with slightly different rust patterns on the metal.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the vertical handle and the cylindrical glass, with visible wear on the metal surfaces.
